description: Canonical fracture codes for Track A (benchmark) and Track B (env_v1). Scorers should emit codes from this registry.

codes.label: Reconciliation item omitted
codes.example: GOOGL segment sum without hedging line

codes.label: Required section or document not retrieved
Agent outside PM script — fallback branch
Repeated tool calls on large tables
Full document load vs targeted sections
Citation snippet not in bundle excerpt
codes.example: Quoted text absent from section excerpt

codes.label: Wrong segment or region scope
codes.example: PEP PFNA substituted for EMEA organic growth

codes.label: Constant-currency adjustment omitted
codes.example: Reported growth recorded as organic CC growth

codes.label: Wrong FX translation method
codes.example: Spot rate used instead of MD&A additive decomposition

codes.label: Alternate methodology within tolerance
codes.example: Valid CC derivation path but not ground-truth method

codes.label: Guidance conflated with actuals or wrong KPI line
codes.example: Content amortization reported as guided cash spend

codes.label: Guidance actual compared using wrong fiscal period column
codes.example: NFLX Q2 cash column (3920) substituted for Q3 actual (4350)

codes.label: Content amortization reported as guided cash spend
codes.example: NFLX Q3 amortization (3980) used as content cash payments

codes.label: Suboptimal tool path or section order
codes.example: Required sections retrieved but wrong order or missing tool class

codes.label: Stock-based compensation added to segment net sales reconciliation
codes.example: AMZN segment sum + SBC expense treated as consolidated net sales
